Chat Edit: 'Advanced Planning - No recursive task decomposition
Tool Composition - Limited function calling capabilities
Error Analysis - No intelligent error diagnosis/fix generation
Dependency Detection - No automatic dependency resolution
Model Training - Fine-tuning capabilities not wired
Distributed Tracing - No execution trace visualization
Memory Persistence - Snapshots not integrated with UI


This isnt to be just the scaffolding, but the entire fully functional enterprise standard elegantly coded '
